identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a professional, high-performance trading terminal that blends Bloomberg precision with Cyberpunk aesthetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Sci-Fi HUD aesthetics.
Emotion First: Evoke focus, speed, and control.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Charts and metrics take center stage.
Negative Space: Use dense grids for data, but breathe in navigation.
Contrast: High contrast for critical data (Price, P/L), low contrast for structure.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Modal titles

data.usage: Prices, Tickers, P/L, Code snippets, Logs

rules: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numerical data and ticker symbols.
Data labels (e.g., 'OPEN', 'HIGH') should be uppercase, text-xs, and tracking-wider.

primary.description: Used for Buy actions, Profit, and Positive indicators.

destructive.description: Used for Sell actions, Loss, and Negative indicators.

accent.description: Used for active states, selection, and focus.

inputs.default: bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent font-mono

charts.container: w-full h-full min-h-[300px] rounded-lg border border-border bg-black/20 overflow-hidden relative
charts.tooltip: bg-popover text-popover-foreground border border-border rounded shadow-md text-xs font-mono

textures.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 1px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 2px, transparent 3px); pointer-events: none; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 10;

animations.trace: Use framer-motion to animate borders on active panels.

login_bg.usage: Background for Login/Register pages with heavy overlay (bg-black/80)

dashboard_empty_state.usage: Empty state or placeholder for charts

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Dark Mode' first approach. The app should feel native to a dark environment.
Use 'recharts' for all charting needs. Customize the default tooltips and axes to match the 'JetBrains Mono' aesthetic.
For the CCI Indicator, create a custom Recharts component that looks like an oscilloscope (green line, dark grid, glowing effect).
The 'EMA Backtester' should use a table with sortable columns. Use Shadcn Table component.
Ensure all inputs in the 'Order Entry' panel are large enough for touch targets but dense enough for desktop efficiency.
Use 'sonner' for all trade notifications (Order Filled, Stop Loss Hit).
Strictly follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard. Do not leave large empty spaces.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles) for testing.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numbers and financial data.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards, especially for red/green text on dark backgrounds.
Do not use generic AI emojis.
Implement micro-interactions on all buttons (hover scale, brightness boost).
